offer: For property managers handling 10-20 properties/month, missed lease renewals cause cash flow gaps. We automate alerts instead of manual tracking of lease dates and rent increases.
problem: Missed lease renewals and escalations leading to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums where property managers share tools
try_it: Let users try Monthly alert system for lease renewals and escalations on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
